findings.description: Section s6 has an empty title string (""). The section covers 未実装/未検討 content from the source and should have a descriptive title such as "未実装・未検討".
findings.source_evidence: Source sections: '未実装' and '未検討' (under 要求) both have clear headings in the RST.

findings.description: Section s13 has an empty title string (""). The section covers 概要 and 特徴 content and should have a descriptive title such as "概要・特徴".
findings.source_evidence: Source sections: '概要' and '特徴' both have clear headings (overline+underline with `----`) in the RST.

findings.description: Section s7 mentions `CacheableSqlPStatement` in its content ("キャッシュ機能付きSqlPStatement（`CacheableSqlPStatement`）を生成") but the class name is absent from s7's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source 全体図 description: "キャッシュ対象SQLの場合のみ、キャッシュ機能付きのSqlPStatementを生成" — CacheableSqlPStatement is the concrete class produced by CacheableStatementFactory for cache-target SQL.
